# freeipa_netgroup (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA Netgroups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the netgroup (cn).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the netgroup.
- `groups` (Set of String) Set of group names associated with this netgroup.
- `hostgroups` (Set of String) Set of hostgroups associated with this netgroup.
- `hosts` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs associated with this netgroup.
- `netgroups` (Set of String) Set of netgroups associated with this netgroup.
- `nisdomainname` (String) NIS domain name (nisdomainname).
- `users` (Set of String) Set of usernames associated with this netgroup.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the netgroup.
